nodes.label: my_SphereSDF
nodes.question: 一個 TiXL ShaderGraphNode 能不能先變成可檢查的 shader fragment？
nodes.logic: SphereSDF produces a structured field contract and feeds RaymarchField shell compilation.
failure_modes: unsupported ShaderGraph node becomes structured error instead of string blob

nodes.label: ShaderGraph Shell
nodes.question: ShaderGraph 能不能在沒有 TiXL DX11 runtime 時編成可試壓的 shader source？
nodes.logic: compile_shadergraph_shell.py writes deterministic GLSL-like source and compile diagnostics.

nodes.label: WebGL Compile Pressure
nodes.question: 生成的 shader source 至少能不能被真 WebGL2 compiler 接受？
nodes.logic: Headless Chrome/WebGL validates syntax and warm-context compile behavior.

nodes.label: Vuo Mesh Adapter
nodes.question: Vuo 的 CPU mesh snapshot 能不能轉成 My World Mesh contract？
nodes.logic: convert_vuo_mesh_shell.py copies Vuo mesh data into backend-neutral My World mesh contract.

nodes.label: my_DrawMeshUnlit
nodes.question: MeshBuffers 能不能先變成可檢查的 ordered Command route？
nodes.logic: Mesh buffer validation, topology gate, shader-stage gate, and commandOps are proven headlessly.

nodes.label: my_SetMaterial / my_DefineMaterials
nodes.question: PBR material 能不能用 scoped context 進入 DrawMesh，而不外洩狀態？
nodes.logic: material_pbr_scope_shell.py proves material list push/restore, environment scope, UseMaterialId selection, and PBR slot binding.
failure_modes: unresolved material id uses current material
texture SRV creation failure falls back to default SRV

nodes.label: Renderer Proof Shell
nodes.question: MeshPbrDrawCommand 能不能真的產出可檢查的非黑 frame artifact？
nodes.logic: native_render_shell.py validates command shape, walks renderer-shaped ops, writes deterministic PPM and frame stats.

nodes.label: TextureView / RenderTarget
nodes.question: Texture / RTV / SRV / UAV / DSV 的所有權和失敗語意有沒有先切乾淨？
nodes.logic: TextureView and RenderTarget contracts forbid invented GPU capabilities and separate render ownership from stateless texture filters.

nodes.label: Native GPU Backend
nodes.question: 真正 Metal/DX11/低延遲 GPU backend 能不能承 TiXL parity？
nodes.logic: Not implemented. Current renderer shell proves command-to-frame plumbing only.

nodes.label: Vuo Host Visual Proof
nodes.question: Vuo 能不能當 host 畫布先看畫面和互動？
nodes.logic: Vuo can prove host rendering and live tick behavior, but not TiXL MeshBuffers / BufferWithViews / Command parity.

edges.label: ShaderGraph field
edges.reason: RaymarchField needs the structured SDF field before shader source can be assembled.

edges.label: shader_source.glsl
edges.reason: A generated shader is not useful until a real compiler has rejected or accepted it.

edges.label: Mesh contract
edges.reason: Vuo CPU mesh contract is compatible in shape, but TiXL MeshBuffers / BufferWithViews parity remains separate.

edges.label: Command route discipline
edges.reason: Material/PBR reuses the same commandOps discipline and adds scoped PBR binding.

edges.label: MeshPbrDrawCommand
edges.reason: native_render_shell.py consumes this exact command artifact and produces frame stats.

edges.label: SRV fallback / view rules
edges.reason: Material texture slots use SRV semantics and must not invent missing view capabilities.

edges.label: replace software shell with GPU backend
edges.reason: The next implementation must keep the same command artifact and swap only the rendering backend.

edges.label: host visual comparison only
edges.reason: Vuo can compare visual presence and tick behavior, but cannot prove TiXL GPU resource parity.

parking_lot.text: Next actual wiring: generate a single patch graph that runs material_pbr_scope_shell.py then native_render_shell.py as one command-to-frame pipeline.
Native GPU backend should replace renderer_shell without changing MeshPbrDrawCommand shape.
Vuo remains useful for live visual/tick tests, but should not be treated as TiXL resource parity proof.
